message:
feat(conformance): add P2C-007 evidence pack test and gitignore evidence artifacts

Adds a comprehensive evidence-generation test for the FSCI-P2C-007
conformance packet. The test produces a self-contained evidence bundle
that validates array API parity across four required operation groups
(creation, indexing, broadcasting, ufunc_dispatch).

The evidence pack includes:
- fixture_manifest.json: operation fixtures with shape/dtype metadata
- parity_gates.json: per-fixture pass/fail outcomes from differential
  oracle testing
- risk_notes.json: documented risk coverage for empty-array edge cases,
  zero-stride broadcasting aliasing, and mixed-dtype promotion drift
- parity_report.json: grouped parity summaries per operation category
- fixture_log.json / artifact_log.json: structured log streams
- RaptorQ sidecars + decode proofs for each primary artifact, with a
  resilient encoder that retries with seed offsets on initialization
  failure

The .gitignore is updated to allow tracking of the evidence/ directory
and its JSON artifacts under P2C-007, while continuing to exclude
other generated artifact subdirectories (anchor/, contracts/, threats/).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
